ast.name: error
ast.source: [Proofreader plugin] error
ast.target: [校对插件] 错误

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the AI model to use for proofreading.
ast.target: 选择用于校对的 AI 模型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Get your API key from https://platform.openai.com/api-keys
ast.target: 从 https://platform.openai.com/api-keys 获取您的 API 密钥

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Higher uses more tokens and is slower, but produces better results.
ast.target: 更高的值会使用更多令牌且速度较慢，但能产生更好的结果。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Endpoint for OpenAI-compatible models, using the API key from above. Leave empty to use the regular OpenAI API. Most users do not need to change this setting, only change this if you know what you are doing.
ast.target: 兼容 OpenAI 模型的端点，使用上面的 API 密钥。留空则使用常规 OpenAI API。大多数用户无需更改此设置，仅在您了解其作用时才进行更改。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Get your API key from https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey
ast.target: 从 https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey 获取您的 API 密钥

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Get your API key from https://console.mistral.ai/api-keys
ast.target: 从 https://console.mistral.ai/api-keys 获取您的 API 密钥

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Get your API key from https://openrouter.ai/settings/keys
ast.target: 从 https://openrouter.ai/settings/keys 获取您的 API 密钥

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Any model ID from https://openrouter.ai/models (e.g. anthropic/claude-3.5-haiku). Select "OpenRouter (custom model)" in the model dropdown above to use this.
ast.target: 来自 https://openrouter.ai/models 的任何模型 ID（例如 anthropic/claude-3.5-haiku）。在上面的模型下拉菜单中选择“OpenRouter（自定义模型）”以使用此设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Processes spaces more accurately, but results in smaller, more numerous changes.
ast.target: 更精确地处理空格，但会导致更小、更频繁的更改。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: No changes will be made to text inside quotation marks (""). (This is not flawless, as the AI sometimes suggests changes across quotes.)
ast.target: 不会对引号（“”）内的文本进行任何更改。（这并非完美无缺，因为 AI 有时会建议跨越引号的更改。）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Preserve **bold**, and *italic* formatting.(This is not flawless, as the AI occasionally rewrite text alongside formatting changes.)
ast.target: 保留 **粗体** 和 *斜体* 格式。（这并非完美无缺，因为 AI 有时会在格式更改的同时重写文本。）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: No changes will be made to lines beginning with `>`. (This is not flawless, as the AI sometimes proposes changes across paragraphs.)
ast.target: 不会对以 `>` 开头的行进行任何更改。（这并非完美无缺，因为 AI 有时会提出跨段落的更改。）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Prevent changing non-smart punctuation to their smart counterparts,  for instance changing " to “ or 1-2 to 1–2. This can be relevant for tools like pandoc, which automatically convert non-smart punctuation based on how they are configured.
ast.target: 防止将非智能标点符号更改为对应的智能标点符号，例如将 " 更改为 “ 或将 1-2 更改为 1–2。这对于像 pandoc 这样的工具可能很重要，它们会根据配置自动转换非智能标点符号。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The LLM must respond ONLY with the updated text for this plugin to work. Leave the text field empty to reset to the default prompt. Most users do not need to change this setting, only change this if you know what you are doing.
ast.target: LLM 必须仅用更新后的文本进行响应，此插件才能正常工作。将文本字段留空可重置为默认提示词。大多数用户无需更改此设置，仅在您了解其作用时才进行更改。

ast.name: setName

ast.target: 保留引用块和标注框内的文本

ast.target: 保留非智能标点符号

ast.target: AIza…

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: sk-or-…
ast.target: sk-or-…

ast.name: setPlaceholder

ast.target: 基于…提供建议

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Cursor is not visible. Scrolled to the cursor instead.
ast.target: 光标不可见。已滚动到光标位置。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: There are no highlights or strikethroughs until the end of the note.
ast.target: 直到笔记末尾都没有高亮或删除线。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Next suggestion not visible. Scrolled to next suggestion instead.
ast.target: 下一个建议不可见。已滚动到下一个建议位置。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please set your Google API key in the plugin settings.
ast.target: 请在插件设置中设置您的 Google API 密钥。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Google API key is not valid. Please verify the key in the plugin settings.
ast.target: Google API 密钥无效。请在插件设置中验证密钥。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Google API rate limit reached. Please wait a moment before trying again.
ast.target: 已达到 Google API 速率限制。请稍候片刻再试。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please set your Mistral API key in the plugin settings.
ast.target: 请在插件设置中设置您的 Mistral API 密钥。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Mistral API key is not valid. Please verify the key in the plugin settings.
ast.target: Mistral API 密钥无效。请在插件设置中验证密钥。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Mistral API rate limit reached. Please wait a moment before trying again.
ast.target: 已达到 Mistral API 速率限制。请稍候片刻再试。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please set your OpenAI API key in the plugin settings.
ast.target: 请在插件设置中设置您的 OpenAI API 密钥。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: OpenAI API key is not valid. Please verify the key in the plugin settings.
ast.target: OpenAI API 密钥无效。请在插件设置中验证密钥。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: OpenAI API rate limit reached. Please wait a moment before trying again.
ast.target: 已达到 OpenAI API 速率限制。请稍候片刻再试。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please set your OpenRouter API key in the plugin settings.
ast.target: 请在插件设置中设置您的 OpenRouter API 密钥。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please set an OpenRouter model name in the plugin settings.
ast.target: 请在插件设置中设置一个 OpenRouter 模型名称。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: OpenRouter API key is not valid. Please verify the key in the plugin settings.
ast.target: OpenRouter API 密钥无效。请在插件设置中验证密钥。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: OpenRouter API rate limit reached. Please wait a moment before trying again.
ast.target: 已达到 OpenRouter API 速率限制。请稍候片刻再试。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: ✅ Text is good, nothing to change.
ast.target: ✅ 文本良好，无需更改。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Already processing a proofreading request.
ast.target: 正在处理校对请求。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Multiple selections are not supported.
ast.target: 不支持多选。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Proofread selection/paragraph
ast.target: 校对选区/段落

ast.name: name
ast.source: Proofread full document
ast.target: 校对整个文档

ast.name: name
ast.source: Accept suggestions in selection/paragraph
ast.target: 接受选区/段落中的建议

ast.name: name
ast.source: Reject suggestions in selection/paragraph
ast.target: 拒绝选区/段落中的建议

ast.name: name
ast.source: Accept next suggestion (or go to suggestion if outside viewport)
ast.target: 接受下一个建议（或在视口外时跳转到建议）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Reject next suggestion (or go to suggestion if outside viewport)
ast.target: 拒绝下一个建议（或在视口外时跳转到建议）
